title: Powah!
description: A tech mod that adds various ways to generate, store and transmit Energy.
body:
# Powah! (Rearchitected)
This is the 1.18+ port of Powah!, originally made by owmii for Forge 1.14-1.16. The license is LGPL and owmii has been MIA since 2021, so I decided to pick up the mod. Available on Forge and Fabric in 1.18-1.20. NeoForge-exclusive from 1.21.

Join the [AE2 discord server](https://discord.gg/Zd6t9ka7ne) for discussion, in the `#powah` channel!

**Requires Cloth Config and GuideME!**

To generate energy, Powah! adds **Furnators**, **Magmators**, **Solar Panels**, **Thermo Generators**, and of course the **Reactor multiblocks**!
![reactor in world](https://i.imgur.com/KHLcxmS.png)
![reactor GUI](https://i.imgur.com/eAgDSet.png)

Powah! also adds the classic **Energy Cables** and **Energy Cells**, but also cool and unique mechanics such as the upgradable **Ender Network**, **Player Transmitters**, the **Energizing crafting system**, and a bunch of cool gadgets and items such as the **Charged Snowball**!

For a good explanation of the mod's content, please have a look at the **Manual**.
